title: elaphrium heterophyllum
intro: Elaphrium heterophyllum, also known as Silybum marianum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the thistle family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its seeds, which contain silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has been used to treat various liver and gallbladder disorders. The health benefits of Elaphrium heterophyllum include its ability to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function. The plant can be prepared as herbal supplements, capsules, or extracts, and is often used to treat conditions such as cirrhosis, hepatitis, and fatty liver disease.
